arch: ✨Show if node is running in 32 or 64 bit mode.
arch 32: Set the default running state to 32bit mode.
arch 64: Set the default running state to 64bit mode
debug: Check the NVM4W process for known problems (troubleshooter)
install:
Usage: install <version> [arch] [--insecure]
✨Install node
e.g. nvm install lts
install lts: Install the lts version of node
install lts --insecure: Bypass SSL validation of the remote download server
install latest: Install the latest version of node
install latest --insecure: Bypass SSL validation of the remote download server
proxy:
Usage: proxy [url]
Set a proxy to use for downloads.
 Leave [url] blank to see the current proxy
 Set [url] to "none" to remove the proxy.
uninstall: Uninstall the specified version of node
use: Switch to use the specified version.
root:
Usage: root [path]
Set the directory where nvm should store different versions of node.js.
If <path> is not set,  the directory where node.js is currently stored will be displayed.
version: Displays the current running version of nvm
node_mirror:
Usage: node_mirror [url]
Set the node mirror.
Defaults to https://nodejs.org/dist/.
Leave [url] blank to use default url.
npm_mirror:
Usage: npm_mirror [url]
Set the npm mirror.
Defaults to https://github.com/npm/cli/archive/.
Leave [url] blank to default url.
